provenance: first-party Toolkit rules derived from public vulnerability classes; no third-party rule pack

rules.title: Untrusted input reaches process execution
rules.message: Untrusted request, event, argument, or input data appears to reach process execution.

rules.title: Read-only allowlist accepts write-capable flags
rules.message: A read-only or allowlist contract appears to include a write-capable flag.

rules.title: Unsafe shell interpolation
rules.message: Untrusted data appears to be interpolated into a shell evaluation boundary.

rules.title: Untrusted path resolution lacks an evident containment boundary
rules.message: An untrusted path is resolved or joined without an evident strict root-containment check.

rules.title: Broad temporary-tree deletion
rules.message: A broad temporary path appears to be recursively deleted without exact operation ownership.

rules.title: Plaintext credential may enter logs or reports
rules.message: A credential-like value appears to enter output, logging, or reporting.

rules.title: Application credential substitutes for operator authority
rules.message: An application/runtime credential appears to substitute for operator authority.

rules.title: Approval or receipt is not bound to target and operation
rules.message: Approval, receipt, or evidence appears reusable without exact target and operation binding.

rules.title: Governed exception fails open
rules.message: A governed exception appears to return an allow/pass result.

rules.title: Unpinned external download or action
rules.message: An Action or external executable download is mutable or lacks provenance verification.

rules.title: Unsafe dynamic execution or deserialisation
rules.message: Dynamic execution or unsafe deserialisation appears reachable.

rules.title: Invalid broad or permanent suppression
rules.message: A suppression appears wildcarded, repository-wide, or permanent.
